# Test Plan & Test Cases — US-001 User Login

**Source story:** [US-001 — User Login](./US-001-login.md)
**Target URL:** https://www.saucedemo.com
**Slug:** `US-001-login`
**Generated by:** `generate-testplan-testcase` skill

---

## 1. Test Plan

### 1.1 Objective
Verify that the SauceDemo login page correctly authenticates valid users,
rejects invalid / locked-out users, and validates required fields.

### 1.2 Scope
- Login form on `/`
- Redirection to `/inventory.html` on success
- Error message display for all failure modes

### 1.3 Out of scope
- Password reset, social login, session timeout.

### 1.4 Approach
- Functional UI tests run on Chromium via Playwright.
- Each acceptance criterion maps to one or more test cases.
- Negative cases share the login page; only inputs and expected errors differ.

### 1.5 Entry criteria
- Application is reachable at the base URL.
- Test users (`standard_user`, `locked_out_user`) exist with password `secret_sauce`.

### 1.6 Exit criteria
- 100% of test cases below pass on Chromium.
- No console errors thrown during the happy path.

### 1.7 Risks
- SauceDemo is a public demo site; outages are outside our control.
- Error message strings may change between releases — keep them in one constant.

---

## 2. Test Cases

### TC-001 — Login with valid standard user (positive)

- **Maps to AC:** AC-1
- **Priority:** High
- **Type:** Functional / Happy path
- **Preconditions:** User is on `https://www.saucedemo.com/`.
- **Test data:** `standard_user` / `secret_sauce`
- **Steps:**
  1. Enter `standard_user` in the username field.
  2. Enter `secret_sauce` in the password field.
  3. Click the **Login** button.
- **Expected result:**
  - Browser navigates to `/inventory.html`.
  - The page heading "Products" is visible.
  - Page title contains "Swag Labs".

---

### TC-002 — Login with invalid credentials (negative)

- **Maps to AC:** AC-2
- **Priority:** High
- **Type:** Functional / Negative
- **Preconditions:** User is on `https://www.saucedemo.com/`.
- **Test data:** `no_such_user` / `wrong_password`
- **Steps:**
  1. Enter `no_such_user` in the username field.
  2. Enter `wrong_password` in the password field.
  3. Click the **Login** button.
- **Expected result:**
  - URL remains `https://www.saucedemo.com/`.
  - Error banner displays:
    `Epic sadface: Username and password do not match any user in this service`.

---

### TC-003 — Login with locked-out user (negative)

- **Maps to AC:** AC-3
- **Priority:** High
- **Type:** Functional / Negative
- **Preconditions:** User is on `https://www.saucedemo.com/`.
- **Test data:** `locked_out_user` / `secret_sauce`
- **Steps:**
  1. Enter `locked_out_user` in the username field.
  2. Enter `secret_sauce` in the password field.
  3. Click the **Login** button.
- **Expected result:**
  - URL remains `https://www.saucedemo.com/`.
  - Error banner displays:
    `Epic sadface: Sorry, this user has been locked out.`

---

### TC-004 — Submit with missing username (validation)

- **Maps to AC:** AC-4
- **Priority:** Medium
- **Type:** Field validation
- **Preconditions:** User is on `https://www.saucedemo.com/`.
- **Test data:** _(username left empty)_ / `secret_sauce`
- **Steps:**
  1. Leave the username field empty.
  2. Enter `secret_sauce` in the password field.
  3. Click the **Login** button.
- **Expected result:**
  - URL remains `https://www.saucedemo.com/`.
  - Error banner displays: `Epic sadface: Username is required`.

---

### TC-005 — Submit with missing password (validation)

- **Maps to AC:** AC-5
- **Priority:** Medium
- **Type:** Field validation
- **Preconditions:** User is on `https://www.saucedemo.com/`.
- **Test data:** `standard_user` / _(password left empty)_
- **Steps:**
  1. Enter `standard_user` in the username field.
  2. Leave the password field empty.
  3. Click the **Login** button.
- **Expected result:**
  - URL remains `https://www.saucedemo.com/`.
  - Error banner displays: `Epic sadface: Password is required`.

---
